prompt: Research the following topic in the codebase and produce a structured summary.
steps: Identify all files and modules relevant to the topic.
Trace the data flow or control flow end-to-end.
List entry points, key functions, and external dependencies.
Note any existing tests and their coverage of the topic.
Summarize findings in a structured format: Overview, Key Files, Data Flow, Gaps, Recommendations.
extra_instructions: Be specific — include file paths and line numbers. Do NOT make any code changes. Output your findings as your final response. Keep output under 200 lines.
